text:
All clean. Here's what was wrong:

**Icon issue:** `useRelayChains` returns a fallback `[convertViemChainToRelayChain(mainnet)]` while the API is loading. The viem `mainnet` chain has no `iconUrl`, so `fromChain`/`toChain` were being set from this fallback (with no icon) and the `!fromChain` guard prevented them from being updated once real data arrived. Fixed by:
1. Waiting for `chains.length >= 2` before setting defaults (ensures real API data, not the fallback)
2. Re-setting chains if `iconUrl` is missing (catches the fallback case)
3. `getChainIconUrl()` helper that falls back to `https://assets.relay.link/icons/{id}/light.png` — so even if `iconUrl` is null/undefined, the icon always renders
